text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Cost and Use Segment Codebook │ March 2026 │ V 1.3 64 

PHYS_PRMRY_PMT 

LABEL: Part B Physician Primary Payer Amount 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates the total amount paid for Part B physician office services (PHYS) by a primary 
payer other than Medicare for a given year. Physician office claims are a subset of the claim lines in the 
Part B carrier and DME data files, and a subset of physician evaluation and management
